task_completion.description: Select the 'Warren Court' collection or the required cases in Jurism
task_completion.visual_evidence: Jurism interface showing the 'Warren Court' collection selected in the left pane, or the three specific cases (Brown v. Board of Education, Gideon v. Wainwright, Miranda v. Arizona) highlighted in the main item pane.

task_completion.description: Select the correct citation style for the bibliography
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Create Bibliography' or similar dialog box in Jurism showing 'Indigo (Law Review)' or 'Bluebook Law Review' selected as the citation style.

task_completion.description: Select RTF as the output format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bibliography dialog showing 'RTF' selected as the output format or save mode.

task_completion.description: Save the bibliography to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, terminal, or save dialog showing the file 'warren_bibliography.rtf' being saved to or existing in the '/home/ga/Documents/' directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the final RTF file contains the correct formatted citations
task_completion.visual_evidence: An opened document or preview of the generated RTF file showing formatted legal citations for Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483), Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335), and Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436).

integrity.description: Agent used the Jurism GUI to generate the bibliography
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with Jurism's 'Create Bibliography' dialog rather than manually typing citations into a word processor or text editor.

integrity.description: Agent generated a genuine RTF file via the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The file should be generated by selecting RTF in the Jurism export dialog, not by creating a plain text file and manually renaming the extension to .rtf.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually type or copy-paste the expected answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of the agent opening a text editor and manually typing out the case names and reporter numbers to fake the bibliography output.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Output path: /home/ga/Documents/warren_bibliography.rtf. Expected cases to be cited: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483), Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335), and Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436).
